behavior: Built In, Dice HTML, SimplyHired, and Glassdoor scheduled automation, connectivity probes, and pasted-URL fetches stop locally under current provider policy. Legacy consent and configuration cannot restore transport. User-opened links, visible Browser Import, and manual entry remain separate user-controlled paths.
revision_scope: The committed disabled source manifests and review fixture, source-policy installation, consent retirement, scheduler and health boundaries, adapter deletion, URL-operation split, migration 18, native and development health controls, renderer controls, maintained taxonomy, user documentation, and focused tests.

commands.command: env -u JOBSENTINEL_LIVE_KEYRING_TESTS cargo test -p jobsentinel-sources --lib; env -u JOBSENTINEL_LIVE_KEYRING_TESTS cargo test -p jobsentinel-application --lib; env -u JOBSENTINEL_LIVE_KEYRING_TESTS cargo test -p jobsentinel-domain --lib
commands.relevant_result: The source library passed 395 tests with 9 ignored, the application library passed 538 tests with 1 ignored, and the domain library passed 133 tests before the final focused policy regressions. The final URL, consent-reconciliation, scheduler, and disabled-manifest regressions were rerun separately after their last corrections.
commands.caveat: Every Rust command explicitly disabled live keyring tests. No live source, credential, Tauri launch, or Keychain path ran.

commands.command: env -u JOBSENTINEL_LIVE_KEYRING_TESTS cargo test -p jobsentinel-application url_preview_rejects_policy_blocked_sources_before_transport --lib; env -u JOBSENTINEL_LIVE_KEYRING_TESTS cargo test -p jobsentinel-application test_local_acknowledgement_cannot_restore_a_retired_source --lib; env -u JOBSENTINEL_LIVE_KEYRING_TESTS cargo test -p jobsentinel-assistance bookmarklet_import --lib; env -u JOBSENTINEL_LIVE_KEYRING_TESTS cargo test -p jobsentinel ipc::health::tests --lib; env -u JOBSENTINEL_LIVE_KEYRING_TESTS cargo test -p jobsentinel ipc::import::tests --lib
commands.relevant_result: Pasted-URL fetches for the four retired providers and YC stopped before transport with operation-specific recovery. Reconciled local acknowledgements stayed disabled. All 14 Browser Import tests preserved the visible-capture distinction. All 4 native health tests and 4 import-error boundary tests passed.
commands.caveat: Tests used isolated databases and local fixtures. Browser Import did not contact provider sites.

commands.command: env -u JOBSENTINEL_LIVE_KEYRING_TESTS cargo test -p jobsentinel-storage migration_18 --lib; env -u JOBSENTINEL_LIVE_KEYRING_TESTS npm run lint:sqlx
commands.relevant_result: Migration 18 deleted the four retired health rows, rejected insert and rename restoration, advanced compatibility metadata, and passed SQLx offline metadata verification against an isolated migrated database.
commands.caveat: No user database was opened or modified.

commands.relevant_result: Focused health, import, taxonomy, and development-runtime regressions passed. Hostile restored health rows expose no row or action, policy-blocked pasted links expose no consent override, and maintained source records remain manual-only.
commands.caveat: The full frontend suite was intentionally not rerun. Focused changed-behavior tests were used per the execution plan.

commands.command: npm run typecheck; npm run lint; npm run harness:check; npm run lint:file-size; npm run lint:docs; npm run lint:language; npm run lint:architecture; npm run lint:security; git diff --check
commands.relevant_result: TypeScript, ESLint, harness state, file limits, maintained docs, language rules, architecture, security sensors, secret scan, and patch whitespace passed.
commands.caveat: Repository GitHub Actions remain temporarily disabled by user direction and must be restored before merge.

commands.command: env -u JOBSENTINEL_LIVE_KEYRING_TESTS cargo fmt --all -- --check; env -u JOBSENTINEL_LIVE_KEYRING_TESTS cargo clippy -p jobsentinel-domain -p jobsentinel-assistance -p jobsentinel-application -p jobsentinel --lib -- -D warnings
commands.relevant_result: Changed Rust production libraries passed formatting and Clippy with warnings denied.
commands.caveat: The focused library lane avoided live credential and desktop launch behavior.

commands.command: One independent read-only adversarial review of provider-policy evidence, URL boundaries, scheduler and config authority, health metadata, hostile renderer data, Browser Import separation, and maintained docs
commands.relevant_result: The final reviewer returned SOUND after corrections for reconciliation expectations, health-row mutation, pasted-URL transport, stale taxonomy, visible Browser Import separation, safe recovery copy, impossible health fixtures, and hostile restored rows.
commands.caveat: The reviewer used focused offline checks with live keyring tests disabled and did not access credentials or live providers.

decisions.provider_policy: Current first-party policy evidence disables the retired Built In, Dice HTML, SimplyHired, and Glassdoor automation. Local consent cannot override provider authorization.
decisions.configuration: Preserve legacy fields for compatible reads, then clear retired enablement and acknowledgement in runtime and saved configuration. Preserve append-only policy and consent history.
decisions.transport: Scheduled checks, connectivity probes, and pasted-URL fetches stop before provider contact. Direct raw scheduler flags fail closed with fixed local errors.
decisions.browser_import: Visible Browser Import is distinct from an application-owned URL fetch and remains available for the four retired boards. YC retains its stricter no-fetch and no-capture boundary.
decisions.health: Migration 18 removes retired health metadata and prevents recreation. Native IPC, development mocks, and renderer controls also reject or hide hostile restored identifiers.
decisions.dice_mcp: The official Dice MCP remains documentation-only and review-required until exact endpoint, schema, privacy, pacing, and fixture contracts are approved.
decisions.credential_tests: Keep live keyring tests opt-in. Every unattended Rust command unsets JOBSENTINEL_LIVE_KEYRING_TESTS.

review.adversarial_verdict: SOUND after provider-policy, URL-operation, hostile-state, and maintained-copy corrections
remaining_findings: Milestone 4 still needs employer discovery, regional packs, restricted Workbench, visible-capture governance, Smart Paste governance, source-context applied logging, simulator completion, and Gate 3 evidence.
Windows 11, macOS 26, Linux, installed-app, and signed-package proof remain release-matrix work.
Repository GitHub Actions must be re-enabled and verified before merge.
Commit 8a7d3439 is local-only until a non-Keychain GitHub credential becomes available.
